---
title: "Quantbot"
subtitle: "Multi-Agent Portfolio Advisor service for retail investors | UC Berkeley MIDS"
description: "A cloud-based multi-agent portfolio advisor that helps retail investors build personalized portfolios based on risk tolerance, budget, and preferences."
author:
  - name: Preethi Raju
    url: https://linkedin.com/in/preethi-raju-a0840192
  - name: Phillip Hoang
    url: https://linkedin.com/in/philiphoang
  - name: Mohamed Bakr
    url: https://linkedin.com/in/mohdbakr
  - name: Sameer Karim
    url: https://linkedin.com/in/sameer-karim
  - name: Gilbert Wong
    url: https://github.com/gilbertwong22
date: "2025-07-01"
date-modified: "2025-07-01"
slug: "quantbot"
image: /projects/quantbot/featured.png
image-alt: "Quantbot project screenshot"
categories: 
  - GenAI
  - Python
  - AWS
  - React
  - Multi-Agent Systems
  - Neo4j
  - PostgreSQL
  - MIDS
links:
- icon: link
  name: Website
  url: https://thequantbot.com
  target: _blank
  rel: noopener noreferrer
- icon: file
  name: Documentation
  url: https://docs.thequantbot.com
  target: _blank
  rel: noopener noreferrer
---

![Quantbot](/projects/quantbot/screenshot.png){.project-banner}

A cloud-based chat agent designed to help retail investors build personalized portfolios and understand key investment principles based on their risk tolerance, budget, and preferences. Built using Python (backend) and React (frontend), the system leverages Google's ADK for a multi-agent architecture and Neo4j for memory and knowledge graph management. Deployed entirely on AWS, including PostgreSQL for data storage and Route 53 for domain routing, the platform offers an intelligent, scalable interface that combines financial expertise with conversational AI.
